name: Tablet and Laptop Sleeve - heyday™ with Vivien Rodriguez
description:
Protect your device in style with the Tablet and Laptop Sleeve from heyday™, designed in collaboration with Vivien Rodriguez. Compatible with most laptops up to 15", this lightweight sleeve combines functionality with flair, featuring quirky, imaginative art that adds a unique touch to your everyday carry. Crafted from durable material, it ensures your devices stay safe from scratches and bumps while making a bold statement.

About the artist: Vivien Rodriguez is a Mexican-American artist born and raised in Los Angeles, California. She derives a lot of her inspiration from her world travels, fascination with the natural world, and Mexican roots. Using strong psychedelic linework inspired by patterns in nature, Vivien hopes to take viewers through a visual journey depicting the strong connection between humans and nature.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
